parameters.query: SELECT c.characteristic_id, c.characteristic_name, c.is_mandatory, c.type_id, c.allows_custom, COALESCE( (SELECT json_agg(v) FROM ( SELECT cv.value_name AS name FROM catalogs.characteristic_values cv WHERE cv.marketplace = c.marketplace AND cv.characteristic_id = c.characteristic_id AND cv.is_active = true ORDER BY cv.value_name LIMIT 50 ) v), '[]'::json ) AS attr_values FROM catalogs.characteristics c WHERE c.marketplace = $1 AND c.category_id = $2 AND c.is_active = true ORDER BY c.is_mandatory DESC, c.characteristic_name;
